user.title: Add an Apple TV remote
user.description: Pick which Apple TV this remote bundle should drive, and give it a name. You must have HA's `apple_tv` integration already paired with the device.

error.remote_unavailable: That Apple TV remote entity is no longer available.

abort.no_apple_tvs: No Apple TVs are paired in Home Assistant. Add the `apple_tv` integration first, then try again.
abort.already_configured: This Apple TV remote bundle is already configured.
